assertion_results.text: The answer mentions `pytest --cov`, `pytest-cov`, or an equivalent pytest coverage command or plugin
The answer recommends prioritizing meaningful, risky, or critical paths rather than blindly chasing one global percentage target
assertion_results.evidence: States: "Short answer: don’t chase a blanket percentage. Keep a sane floor, then target coverage where it reduces risk the most." and "Prioritize by risk/impact: Focus on complex, bug-prone, and business-critical paths first"

assertion_results.text: The answer does not treat raw coverage percentage as the only quality signal
assertion_results.evidence: States: "don’t chase a blanket percentage"; "Improve test quality over count"; "Make coverage meaningful: Enable branch coverage ... Exclude noise ..."; also suggests diff coverage and risk-based focus, not a single global %
